Email 3:
Subject: No more broke people! (Yay!)

www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

In this one, I show you the ONE THING that will get you more qualified leads.
It's a simple fix, too.
You also get to see me openly make fun of two of my clients. (But only because they're
knuckleheads and they're cool with it lol).

Frank
P.S. I'm not actually PURPLE.
The dang camera setup I'm using makes me look purple or green.
Been fiddling with it forever. This morning, I learned that the specific type of camera I'm
using is kind of notorious for making people look purple or green ...and I learned how to
fix it.
(Something to do with "white balance".)
www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 5 --

So I ordered the fix-it thingy from Amazon and we'll see how it goes.
I'm telling you this because people have written in ...worried about my health lol.
(Because I look like I'm on the verge of a heart attack or something.)
I actually appreciate that. And - it's the camera. Or more accurately - my inability to set it
up right lol.
Anyway - watch this if you want better leads (as taught from a purple person).
www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 5 --
